context_string: Keyword: Distributed Systems. Context: Distributed systems coordinate multiple nodes across a network for consensus, fault tolerance, and consistency. Covers Raft and Paxos consensus, leader election, split-brain, CAP theorem, eventual consistency, linearizability, serializability, vector clocks, Lamport timestamps, distributed locks, quorum reads and writes, fencing tokens, two-phase commit, distributed transactions, failover, Zookeeper, etcd, Consul, CockroachDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB, gossip protocols, anti-entropy, replication lag, partition tolerance, network partitions, CRDT, causal consistency.

Keyword: Database Internals. Context: Low-level mechanisms inside databases for storage, indexing, and correctness. B-tree and B+-tree structure, page splits, fill factor, LSM tree compaction (leveled vs tiered), SSTables, memtables, bloom filters, write-ahead log WAL, MVCC multi-version concurrency control, snapshot isolation, serializable snapshot isolation SSI, optimistic vs pessimistic locking, row-level locks, deadlock detection, buffer pool management, dirty pages, checkpoint, crash recovery, ARIES recovery algorithm, LRU eviction, slotted pages, heap files, tuple layout, NULL bitmaps, TOAST out-of-line storage, index types hash GiST GIN BRIN covering indexes. Spatial indexing internals: R-tree, quad-tree, space-filling curves, Hilbert curve, S2 geometry library, S2 Cell IDs, cell coverings, geospatial index design, range scans on spatial keys, interleaved tables for co-location, multi-level spatial tokens, leaf-cell range encoding, two-phase spatial query pattern (index scan plus post-filter), great-circle distance, Haversine formula.

Keyword: Query Planning. Context: Query planning and optimization in relational databases. Cost-based optimization, statistics and histograms, selectivity estimation, join ordering, hash join nested loop merge join, index scan vs sequential scan, predicate pushdown, projection pushdown, partition pruning, plan caching, adaptive query execution, lateral joins, materialized CTEs, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, cardinality estimation, query hints, optimizer internals in PostgreSQL MySQL DuckDB Spark, query rewriting, subquery decorrelation, view merging.

Keyword: Replication. Context: Database and storage replication for durability and availability. Single-leader multi-leader leaderless replication, synchronous vs asynchronous replication, replication lag, read-your-writes consistency, monotonic reads, logical replication, physical streaming replication, change data capture CDC, binlog WAL tailing, conflict resolution, global databases geo-distribution, consistency models from eventual to strict serializability, replica sets, follower reads, semi-sync replication, GTID-based replication.

Keyword: Storage Engines. Context: Storage engines determine how databases persist and retrieve data. InnoDB, MyISAM, RocksDB, WiredTiger, fractal tree, columnar formats Parquet ORC Arrow, row-oriented vs column-oriented layout, dictionary encoding, run-length encoding, bitpacking, delta encoding, zone maps, late materialization, vectorized execution, SIMD on columns, tiered storage hot warm cold, disaggregated cloud-native storage, LSM compaction, SSTable format, memtable flush, bloom filter false positive rate.

Keyword: PostgreSQL. Context: PostgreSQL advanced open-source relational database. MVCC implementation, VACUUM autovacuum, bloat dead tuples, HOT updates, pg_stat_activity, pg_stat_bgwriter, toast tables, tablespaces, partitioning range list hash, logical replication slots, pglogical, Citus sharding, PostGIS, pg_trgm, full-text search tsvector, PL/pgSQL functions, row-level security, publication subscription, pg_upgrade, performance tuning work_mem shared_buffers effective_cache_size checkpoint settings, explain analyze, index types, pg_bouncer connection pooling.

Keyword: MySQL. Context: MySQL widely-used open-source relational database. InnoDB internals, redo log, doublewrite buffer, change buffer, adaptive hash index, binary log row statement mixed formats, GTID-based replication, group replication, MySQL Router, ProxySQL, semi-synchronous replication, XA transactions, online DDL instant algorithm, pt-online-schema-change, Percona Server, TiDB, innodb_buffer_pool_size, innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit, thread concurrency, slow query log, performance schema.

Keyword: Redis. Context: Redis in-memory data structure store for caching pub/sub real-time workloads. Data types strings hashes lists sorted sets streams HyperLogLog bitmaps geospatial, RDB snapshots AOF persistence, Redis Cluster sharding hash slots, Sentinel high availability, Lua scripting, pipelining, MULTI/EXEC transactions, keyspace notifications, Pub/Sub, Streams, RESP3 protocol, RedisJSON, RediSearch vector search full-text, RedisTimeSeries, module API, ziplist listpack intset encodings, memory optimization, eviction policies LRU LFU.

Keyword: ClickHouse. Context: ClickHouse columnar OLAP database for fast analytical queries. MergeTree engine family ReplacingMergeTree SummingMergeTree AggregatingMergeTree CollapsingMergeTree, primary key sparse index, granules, data skipping indexes minmax set bloom_filter, mark files, merge process, materialized views, distributed tables, sharding replication with Keeper ZooKeeper, projection system, codec compression LZ4 ZSTD Delta DoubleDelta Gorilla, TTL data tiering, system.query_log profiling, array join, window functions, groupArray.

Keyword: DuckDB. Context: DuckDB in-process analytical database for OLAP workloads. Keyword: ACID Transactions. Context: ACID properties atomicity consistency isolation durability in databases. Transaction isolation levels read uncommitted read committed repeatable read serializable, dirty reads, non-repeatable reads, phantom reads, two-phase locking 2PL, MVCC for isolation, savepoints, nested transactions, distributed transactions two-phase commit 2PC, saga pattern for long-running transactions, optimistic concurrency control OCC, write skew anomalies, serialization anomalies, BEGIN COMMIT ROLLBACK.

Keyword: NewSQL. Context: NewSQL databases combine ACID transactions with horizontal scalability.
